title: Botox pricing. Should I charge by the unit or the area？ | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: Botox pricing. Should I charge by the unit or the area？ ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt
excerpt: So here's a business question on how you charge for your treatments [Music] now i know it's much more common in the u.

segments.text: so here's a business question on how you charge for your treatments [Music] now i know it's much more common in the u.s to charge per unit of toxins so if you're using 100 units you charge 2 pounds 40 per unit something like that um in the uk we tend to do this thing of charging by areas and there are advantages and disadvantages to each of course the biggest advantage is that you char you pay every single unit is paid for by your client the downside is an element of commoditizing you because now you're only the value of units which is down which is a negative and of course there's also an incentive clinician to use a bit more if they can to get charged a bit more which some patients may not like that so the way that we do it more commonly in the uk is the charge per area now the downside with this particularly for the clinician is there might be some patients who you are basically subsidizing that treatment i've certainly had some men in the past who have really big muscles and we don't our pricing structure just didn't build that in

and it was almost pointless me treating them from a business perspective so and that can happen if you're not careful you can obviously tweak your structure so that you supplement people who use over a certain unit that's something else and of course on the other end of the spectrum you might have people use very little and they they're still effectively they could feel like they're paying over the odds now i actually think we should move towards charging for the service not for the products that we use so i prefer the area thing because a little bit better than the units because um there's a sense that really what you're paying for is the skill and the after care and the consultation and all of that you're not just charging per unit so those are my thoughts on it uh it's up for you to decide which one works best and of course which one your patients are expecting because it's one thing having an opinion and doing things differently but if everyone is at odds with your way of charging that might cause its own problems so but those are my thoughts hope it helps
